title: syringa dilatata f. rubra
intro: Syringa dilatata f. rubra, also known as the red flowered syringa or red flowering lilac, is a species of flowering plant in the olive family that is native to the Balkan Peninsula. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat a range of health issues, such as fever, coughs, and respiratory problems, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Syringa dilatata f. rubra include its use as a natural expectorant, which can help to relieve congestion and coughs, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and soothe respiratory tract irritations. Herbal preparations of Syringa dilatata f. rubra include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the flowers in hot water or using a solvent to extract the plant's medicinal compounds.
